title: dregea stellaris
intro: Dregea stellaris, also known as the Starfish Plant, is a type of flowering vine native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique star-shaped flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Dregea stellaris include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in modern herbal preparations such as capsules and tinctures.
